title: Payment Methods - Configuring the Smart Voucher

steps.caption: Welcome. This guide shows how to configure the Smart Voucher payment method.
Go to Payment → Payment methods, then click + Add payment method.
In the form, open the Payment method type dropdown.
Select Smart voucher as the Payment method type.
Add the maximum value to the voucher.
If you need to invoice the vouchers, select by User or a pre-selected customer.
